steps.title: Subtract ramshorn cost
steps.content:
The $3$ ramshorn snails cost $7$ dollars each.
$$3\cdot7=21$$So the amount spent on mystery snails is
$$66-21=45$$

steps.title: Divide by mystery price
steps.content:
Each mystery snail costs $9$ dollars, so the number bought is
$$\frac{45}{9}=5$$The answer is A.
